title: Run a session end-to-end from preview to completion
description: Verifies a user can generate a queue preview, start the session, observe step progression, and reach a completed session state.

steps.description: Wait for the session to finish
Verify a session completion event is shown

title: Pause and resume without losing timing continuity
description: Verifies pausing stops ticks and resuming continues timing from a corrected elapsed/remaining time without drift or jumps.

steps.description: Verify a session resumed event is shown
Verify elapsed and remaining time continue changing after resume

title: Start session from preview and consume the same ordered queue
description: Verifies starting from the preview runs the session in the same step order as shown in the preview list.

steps.description: Record the first two steps shown in the preview order
Wait for the first step to start
Verify the running step sequence matches the preview order for the first two steps

title: Advance mid-step starts the next step immediately
description: Verifies advancing during an active step ends the current step and immediately starts the next step with timing reset for the new step.

steps.description: Verify a step start event is shown for the newly active step
Verify the elapsed time for the new step is near the beginning

title: Generate and display an ordered preview list with step metadata
description: Verifies the smart queue generator produces an ordered list and the preview renders step labels, types, and durations.

steps.description: Verify an ordered list of queued steps is displayed
Verify each listed step shows identifying metadata including a label, type, and duration

title: Show empty state when starting with no queued steps
description: Verifies attempting to start without any queued steps shows an empty state and no session begins.

steps.description: Verify an empty state message is visible indicating there are no steps to run
Verify the session does not enter a running state

title: Conditional blocks evaluate at runtime and affect realized next steps
description: Verifies conditional evaluation occurs at step execution time and changes the realized step sequence shown during playback.

steps.description: Request a queue preview that includes conditional blocks
Wait until execution reaches the conditional step
Verify a conditional evaluation outcome is shown when the conditional step starts
Verify the subsequent realized step sequence reflects the conditional outcome

title: Preview marks conditional steps as deferred evaluation
description: Verifies when the preview includes conditional blocks, the preview indicates those steps are deferred for runtime evaluation.

steps.description: Request a queue preview that includes conditional blocks
Verify conditional steps are marked as deferred evaluation in the preview
